seed_instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals.
org_constraint: The email must consist of exactly three paragraphs, and must include at least five uppercase words.
new_constraint: Each paragraph contains no more than one uppercase word.
instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals. The email must consist of exactly three paragraphs, and must include at least five uppercase words. Each paragraph contains no more than one uppercase word.
response:
Subject: Introduction and Research Goals

Dear Professor Smith, my name is Alex Johnson, and I am writing to express my strong interest in your upcoming seminar on climate change. I have been following your work for years and find your recent publications on renewable energy particularly inspiring.

My primary goal is to contribute to sustainable solutions through rigorous data analysis and field research during my upcoming studies. I hope to join your lab to learn from your team and develop new methodologies for environmental monitoring.

Thank you for considering my request, and I look forward to the possibility of discussing this further at your earliest convenience.
